app.name: DELFluent
app.footer: DELFluent © {{year}} · DELF B2 Practice Platform · All questions are original simulations

landing.title: DELF B2 Exam Practice Platform
landing.subtitle: Systematic practice for Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking · AI correction · Real exam simulation

co.title: Listening
co.desc: Full audio tracks simulating real exam conditions

ce.title: Reading
ce.desc: Argumentative long-form texts with answer locations

po.title: Speaking
po.desc: Recording practice with AI examiner (AI plan)

landing.mockDesc: Simulate the real exam: listening, reading, writing, speaking in sequence

auth.passwordHint: At least 10 characters, mix of upper/lower/digit/symbol

passwordPolicy.categories: Must include at least 3 of: lowercase / uppercase / digit / symbol
passwordPolicy.common: This password is too common, please choose another
passwordPolicy.hint: At least {{min}} characters; mix upper/lowercase, digits and symbols

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: All sessions will be revoked; you will need to sign in again.
changePassword.success: Password updated. Please sign in again.

auth.useAdminLogin: Admin accounts must sign in via the admin console

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send a reset link
forgot.sentDesc: If this email is registered, a reset link has been sent. It will expire in 30 minutes.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: At least 10 characters; include at least 3 of lower/upper/digit/symbol
reset.success: Password reset. Please sign in with your new password.
reset.fail: Reset failed — link may have expired

verify.successDesc: Your account is active. You can now sign in.
verify.trialStartedDesc: Your account is active and your AI Unlimited free trial is ready. Sign in to explore all features.
verify.expiredDesc: The verification link is no longer valid. Please request a new one after signing in.
verify.invalidDesc: We couldn't recognize this verification link.
verify.requiredDesc: We sent a verification email to {{email}}. Click the link inside to activate your account, or press the button below to resend.

sent.title: Verification email sent
sent.desc: We've sent a verification email to {{email}}.
sent.hint: Click the link within 24 hours to activate your account. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
sent.resendFail: Failed to resend, please try later

practice.title: Practice Library
practice.subtitle: Choose a set to begin. Free users can try sets marked 'Free preview'.

hub.title: Choose practice mode
hub.subtitle: Practice each skill on its own, or take a full mock exam.
hub.poDesc: Speaking drill · Monologue + débat with AI scoring
hub.mockDesc: All 4 skills in sequence · Full exam flow
hub.poDisabledDesc: AI speaking evaluation is temporarily unavailable.

exam.audioNotSupported: Your browser does not support audio playback
exam.audioNotUploaded: Audio for this listening question has not been uploaded yet — please contact the admin.
exam.audioPlayLimitReached: You have reached the maximum number of plays for this clip.
exam.coPhasePrep: Reading time — read the questions before the audio starts
exam.coPhaseGap: Listen-twice gap — review your answers before the second play
exam.coPhaseAnswer: Answering window — finalize your answers for this document
exam.coAutoNextDoc: Audio for document {{n}} is over. The next document will start automatically.
exam.coCannotEditYet: You can answer once the audio has played.
exam.coReadyHint: Audio won't start automatically — click Play when you're ready. You can answer while listening.
exam.coCountdownHint: Suggested reading time {{sec}}s (hint only — you can play anytime)
exam.essayPlaceholder: Write your essay here (250 words minimum)...
exam.essayAITip: 💡 Writing is not auto-graded in MVP. Upgrade to AI plan for AI correction.
exam.unsupported: This question type requires recording (coming soon)

ocr.noText: No text detected. Try a clearer photo.
ocr.success: Recognised — text inserted into the editor

exam.fiveMinWarning: ⏰ 5 minutes remaining — please finalize your answers.
exam.timeUp: Time is up — submitting your answers automatically.
exam.autoSubmitted: Your exam was auto-submitted because time expired.
exam.passCriteriaInlineNoTime: Total ≥ {{total}}/100 · each section ≥ {{skillMin}}/{{skillMax}} · no time limit
exam.passPerSkill: Each of the 4 sections must score ≥ {{min}}/{{max}}
exam.fiveMinSectionWarning: ⏰ 5 minutes left in this section — you cannot return to it once time expires.
exam.sectionTimeUp: Section time is up — moving to the next section.
exam.cepeBannerTitle: Reading + Writing · 120 min total, allocate freely
exam.cepeBannerDesc: This part has 3 reading texts and 1 writing task; manage the time yourself. The speaking part follows after you submit.
exam.writtenDoneToSpeaking: Written part submitted — starting the speaking part
exam.advanceAnswered: You have answered {{done}} of {{total}} questions in this section.
exam.advanceNoReturn: Once you move on, you will not be able to return to this section — this mirrors the real DELF B2 exam.

exceeded.CE: You've used all {{cap}} free reading sets this month. Upgrade to Standard for unlimited practice.
exceeded.CO: You've used all {{cap}} free listening sets this month. Upgrade to Standard for unlimited practice.
exceeded.MOCK: You've used all {{cap}} free mock exams this month. Upgrade to Standard for unlimited mocks.
exceeded.generic: Free monthly quota reached. Upgrade to unlock unlimited practice.

review.title: Results
review.writtenDoneDesc: Review your written score below, or start the speaking part now (choose 1 of 3).
review.correctnessHint: Listening and Reading are not scored — only the correctness rate is shown.
review.predictionHint: The full B2 pass prediction (by correctness rate, with official gates) is in the learning centre.
review.noResult: No results found. Return to practice and try again.
review.delfPending: Writing is still being graded by AI — final verdict will update once grading completes.
review.delfGateHint: Each of the 4 sections must also score at least {{skillMin}}/{{skillMax}}.

mistakes.title: Mistake Notebook
mistakes.infoDesc: Questions you answered incorrectly are collected here. Re-practice them — once you answer correctly, they are automatically removed.
mistakes.retryEmpty: Please choose or enter an answer first.
mistakes.retryCorrectBanner: ✓ Correct — this question will be removed from your notebook.
mistakes.retryWrong: Not quite — have another look at the explanation.
mistakes.retryFail: Failed to submit — please try again.
mistakes.empty: No mistakes yet — keep practising and any wrong answers will appear here.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Secured by Stripe · Cancel anytime · 7-day refund

trial.promoBanner: New users: {{days}}-day free trial of AI Unlimited
trial.registerHint: Verify your email after sign-up — no card required
trial.eligibleHint: Start now and unlock all features
trial.usedHint: You've already used your free trial — subscribe to continue
trial.startSuccess: Trial started — enjoy {{days}} days of full access
trial.startFailed: Could not start trial — please try again
trial.verifyEmailFirst: Please verify your email before starting a trial

pricing.paymentNote: 💳 Secured by Stripe (cards · WeChat Pay · Alipay)
pricing.adaptivePricingNote: Prices shown in {{currency}}. Stripe converts to your local currency at checkout.
pricing.embeddedPricingNote: Prices shown in {{currency}}. At checkout you can choose your payment currency (USD, EUR, CNY, etc.) with live Stripe conversion.
pricing.adaptivePaymentNote: 💳 Secured by Stripe — choose currency at checkout with live conversion (cards)

ai_unlimited.name: AI Unlimited
features: OCR photo upload for handwritten essays

checkout.stripeAutoRenew: Enable auto-renew (monthly Stripe subscription, cancel anytime in Orders)
checkout.title: Scan to pay
checkout.domesticHint: For mainland China: WeChat / Alipay QR payments
checkout.overseasHint: For overseas users: you will be redirected to Stripe Checkout
checkout.stripeHint: You will be redirected to Stripe Checkout; available methods depend on your Stripe account and currency/region
checkout.stripeEmbeddedHint: Pay on this site with card — choose your currency on the checkout page
checkout.currencySelectorNote: List prices are anchored in {{currency}}. Choose your charge currency below.
checkout.missingCheckoutSession: Checkout session is invalid or expired — please start again
checkout.completeFailed: Payment not completed — retry or check Orders
checkout.createFailed: Failed to create order, please retry
checkout.payClosed: Order closed or failed, please retry

grade.title: AI essay grade
grade.tooShort: Essay is too short ({{count}} words) — minimum {{min}} words required
grade.planRequired: Upgrade to Standard or higher to unlock AI grading
grade.quotaExceeded: You've used all AI gradings for this month
grade.pollingHint: This page refreshes automatically once grading completes.
grade.empty: No essay submitted for this question.
grade.slowWarning: AI grading is taking longer than usual — the provider may be busy. You can keep waiting or click Rewrite to retry.
grade.errNotConfigured: AI grading is not configured. Please contact the administrator.
grade.errTruncated: AI output was truncated. Please re-grade or try again later.
grade.errBadOutput: AI returned malformed output. Please re-grade.
grade.errProviderDown: AI grading service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
grade.errRateLimited: Too many requests — please wait a moment and try again.
grade.errBadRequest: Grading request was rejected. Please contact the administrator.
grade.errCallFailed: Network or connection issue. Please retry.
grade.errTimeout: Grading timed out (>25s). Please re-grade or edit and resubmit.

model.pickerSubtitle: Higher tier = more accurate, also more expensive. You can re-grade later.

template.quotaExceeded: Plan limit reached. Upgrade for more templates.
template.upgradeAlert: Saving custom essay templates is an AI-plan feature. Upgrade to save your own phrases and structures.
template.empty: No templates yet — click «New» to create one
template.contentPlaceholder: Enter a common phrase or essay structure…

resume.missingOrderId: Missing order id, cannot resume payment status
resume.successBody: We'll verify your order and activate your plan (may take a few seconds).
resume.cancelBody: You can continue payment from the orders page, or go back to pricing.

contracts.title: Auto-renew
contracts.unsignConfirmBody: Auto charges will stop. Your current entitlement remains active until it expires.
contracts.openingPortalFailed: Unable to open subscription portal, please retry
contracts.unsignHint: Stripe subscriptions: use "Manage subscription" to update card or cancel via the Stripe portal. WeChat / Alipay legacy contracts: unsign from within their app.

exam.subtitle: Full DELF B2 Production Orale simulation: preparation, monologue, examiner débat, then AI scoring.
exam.chooseSubtitle: Choose one of the topics below to answer
exam.notesPlaceholder: Plan your viewpoint, structure, examples, and counter-arguments…
exam.notesAutoSaveHint: Notes are auto-saved in this browser.
exam.skipPrepBody: You still have preparation time left. Once you start, you can't return to this step.
exam.monologueHint: Present and defend your viewpoint with developed arguments. Maximum {{sec}} seconds.
exam.debatHint: The examiner asks a question. Reply within {{sec}} seconds, defending your stance.
exam.submittingDesc: Transcription then AI scoring is in progress. You'll be redirected to your result page.
exam.submitFailed: Submission failed. Check your connection and retry.
exam.missingMonologue: Monologue recording is missing — please record it before submitting.
exam.missingFollowUp: Follow-up question {{n}} hasn't been recorded — please record it before submitting.
exam.upgradeRequiredDesc: AI-graded oral simulation is included from the Standard plan and above. Upgrade to unlock.
exam.quotaExceededDesc: You've used all of your speaking quota this month ({{cap}}/month). Try again next month or upgrade.
exam.notFoundDesc: This exam set does not contain a Production Orale question.

recorder.maxLengthHint: Max length: {{sec}}s. Recording auto-stops at the limit.
recorder.permissionDenied: Microphone access denied. Enable it in your browser settings.
recorder.mimeUnsupported: This browser does not support a compatible audio format.
recorder.noDevice: No microphone detected. Check your device or connect a headset, then retry.
recorder.unsupportedDesc: Your browser does not support MediaRecorder. Use Chrome, Firefox, or Safari ≥ 14.1.
recorder.insecureDesc: Browsers only allow microphone access on secure (HTTPS) pages. Open the site via its https:// address; for local development use localhost on your computer. The mic is blocked when testing on a phone over a LAN IP address.

grade.title: AI score · Production Orale
grade.slowWarning: Grading is taking longer than usual. You can wait or check back later.
grade.errBadAudio: The recording could not be read. Try recording again.
grade.errSttEmpty: No speech detected in the recording.
grade.errSttNotConfigured: The transcription service is not configured on the server.
grade.errNotConfigured: The AI service is not configured on the server.
grade.errProviderDown: The AI provider is temporarily unavailable.
grade.errRateLimited: Too many requests. Try again shortly.
grade.errTruncated: AI response was truncated. Please re-grade.
grade.errBadRequest: Invalid request. Contact support if it persists.
grade.errTimeout: Timed out. The server may still finish; reload later.
grade.errTooShort: Transcript too short (< {{min}} words) — AI cannot grade.
grade.noRecording: No recording was submitted for this question.
grade.planRequired: AI oral grading requires a paid plan.

pricingReview.title: Pricing review (live FX)
pricingReview.fxLine: FX ({{date}}): 1 EUR = ${{usd}} USD / ¥{{cny}} CNY · source: frankfurter.app (ECB)

col.eurAnchorTip: The EUR price for the same plan + cycle; the reference others are compared to
col.deviationTip: Local price converted to EUR at live FX vs the EUR anchor. ≥{{warn}}% orange, ≥{{alert}}% red

overview.failedEmpty: No failed renewals at the moment

catalog.missingStripeAlert: {{count}} subscription price(s) missing stripePriceId — Stripe auto-renewal cannot run
catalog.trialBanner: Free trial: enabled · {{days}} days · {{plan}} · auto-granted after email verification
catalog.eurOnlyHint: Only {{currency}} prices are shown to customers. Create new prices in {{currency}} and map Stripe recurring Price IDs.
catalog.confirmDisable: Disable this entry? Historical orders stay linked, the row is hidden by default
catalog.confirmDelete: Permanently delete this price? Only allowed when no orders or subscriptions reference it.
catalog.confirmDeleteProduct: Permanently delete this product and all its prices? Only allowed when no orders or subscriptions reference them.
catalog.deleteInUse: Cannot delete: linked orders or subscription contracts still exist. Keep it disabled instead.
catalog.tooltipDelete: Delete permanently (must be disabled first; no order references)

priceForm.codeHint: e.g. STANDARD_1M / AI_12M (unique ID; cannot change after create)
priceForm.slotTaken: This product already has a price for that cycle and currency ({{code}}). Edit or delete the existing row first.
priceForm.displayNameHint: Optional label shown to users; leave empty to show only amount and billing period
priceForm.amountHint: Enter the amount the user pays (in main currency unit, not cents)
priceForm.stripePriceIdHint: Create a recurring Price in Stripe Dashboard, then paste the price_xxx ID here. Required only for auto-renew prices.
priceForm.stripeRecurringPriceIdHint: Recommended: used for subscriptions (mode=subscription) matched by this price’s currency. If empty, we fall back to the Stripe Price ID above.
priceForm.eurAnchorHint: Embedded Checkout uses {{currency}} as the anchor. Customers choose their payment currency on the checkout page.

filters.search: Search email / order ID / transaction no.

refund.title: Manual refund
refund.amountHint: Pre-filled with the remaining refundable amount; lower it for a partial refund

contracts.terminateConfirm: Force terminate this subscription? The payment channel will be notified and the row marked TERMINATED.
